case_title: DANIELS, ROBERT W. VS THE CITY TOW

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $356.80 FILED BY DANIELS, ROBERT W. AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23074, RECORD TRANSFERRED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANIELS, ROBERT W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW $356.80 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $376.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
